title: dyssodia tenuiloba var. treculii
intro: Dyssodia tenuiloba var. treculii, also known as Treculia, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in the southwestern United States and Mexico. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Dyssodia tenuiloba var. treculii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Dyssodia tenuiloba var. treculii is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
